title: Quantifying and Expanding the Theoretical Capacity of Late-Interaction Retrieval Models
innovation_summary: Quantifying and Expanding the Theoretical Capacity of Late-Interaction Retrieval Models: Leveraging our theoretical framework, we introduce Signed MaxSim which allows late-interaction models to exactly replicate any real-valued inner product, something we prove standard MaxSim is not.
why_it_matters: Overall signal 81/100 driven by novelty 100 and practical impact 84.
